required_tools.reason: All projects use GitHub for PR creation, status checks, and dashboard surfacing. Required for PR creation, status polling, and dashboard integration.

Infrastructure provisioning, namespace/CRD management, and network policy enforcement are all performed via Kubernetes manifests and operators. Required for all Bolt tasks and for Nova/Blaze to mount ConfigMaps, secrets, and manage deployments.

Linear is used for issue creation, delegate assignment, and validation of assignee mapping. Required for Nova tasks (issue creation, delegate resolution, notifications) and Tess tasks (validation via direct Linear API).

ExternalSecrets CRDs are used to sync sensitive tokens (Linear, GitHub, NOUS, Discord, service API key) from a backing secret store into Kubernetes. Required for Bolt infra provisioning and secret rotation.
CloudNative-PG Postgres is provisioned and used for pipeline state, artifact persistence, and possibly for agent-to-user mapping. Required for Bolt infra, Nova pipeline state, and test validation.
Redis is provisioned for caching, ephemeral state, and possibly for pipeline coordination. Required for Bolt infra, Nova pipeline, and test validation.

recommended_tools.reason: Loki is present in the cluster and could be used for log aggregation and querying PM server logs for error/fatal validation in E2E tests. Not strictly required, but would improve log-based test assertions and auditability.
